name: Port Eynon to Oxwich
highlights: Spectacular stretch of limestone cliff and coves.
points_of_interest: Culver Hole (medieval dovecote/smuggler's cave); Salt House ruins
viewpoints: Oxwich Point; Three Cliffs Bay in distance
food_drink_nearby: The Smugglers Haunt; The Ship Inn Port Eynon
hazards_notes: Many steep steps; cliff edges; bus back
